common.tagline: The Global Marketplace for AI Training Talent
common.heroSub: Hire. Test. Trust. Train. Connect with elite AI trainers tested on your actual model.

trainersList.title: AI Trainers & Experts — Verified on Your Model
trainersList.description: Browse the Trainova AI directory of fine-tuning, RLHF, prompt engineering, evaluation, safety and data-labeling specialists. Every verified trainer has been tested on a live company model.

requestsList.title: Open AI Training Requests
requestsList.description: Live requests from global companies hiring AI trainers. Fine-tuning, prompt engineering, RLHF, evaluation, data labeling and more — apply directly on Trainova AI.

skillsList.title: AI Skills Directory
skillsList.description: Explore every AI training specialty on Trainova AI — from LLM fine-tuning to safety alignment — with expert counts, trainers and live requests per skill.

pricing.title: Pricing for Companies and Trainers
pricing.description: Simple, transparent pricing for AI training teams. Free to start, Pro for growth, Enterprise for large model programs.

about.title: About Trainova AI
about.description: Trainova AI is the global marketplace, evaluation system and collaboration workspace for AI training talent — built for companies that need verified specialists on their actual models.

trainer.descriptionTemplate: {name} is an AI trainer on Trainova AI specialising in {skills}. {country}

company.descriptionTemplate: {name} is a verified company on Trainova AI, hiring AI trainers for model training, evaluation and data projects.

request.descriptionFallback: Open AI training request on Trainova AI.

skill.titleTemplate: {name} — AI Trainers, Experts and Open Requests
skill.descriptionTemplate: Find {name} specialists on Trainova AI. Browse verified trainers, review open requests and test candidates on your live model.

howItWorks.title: How Trainova AI works
howItWorks.description: From posting a request to evaluating, contracting and paying — see the end-to-end Trainova AI workflow for companies and trainers.

forCompanies.title: Trainova AI for companies
forCompanies.description: Hire, test and contract verified AI trainers on your live model. Request builder, evaluation engine, escrow payments and analytics in one place.

forTrainers.title: Trainova AI for trainers
forTrainers.description: Get matched with global AI training contracts, prove your skills on real company models, and get paid via secure escrow.

blog.title: Trainova AI blog
blog.description: Articles, tutorials and field reports on fine-tuning, RLHF, prompt engineering, evaluation, safety alignment and more.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.description: Answers about Trainova AI: pricing, evaluation, payments, verification, dispute resolution and how the platform works for both sides.

contact.title: Contact Trainova AI
contact.description: Get in touch with our support, sales, press or partnership teams. We respond within one business day.

advertise.title: Advertise on Trainova AI
advertise.description: Reach AI training teams, MLOps leads and verified specialists with featured placements, sponsored search results and category sponsorships.

landing.heroTitle: Hire, test and train the world's best AI specialists.
landing.heroBody: Post a request, link your model or sandbox, and Trainova AI matches you with verified experts — screened on the exact problem you need solved.

pillars.marketplaceBody: Discover verified specialists in fine-tuning, RLHF, prompt engineering, safety alignment and more.
pillars.evalBody: Test candidates on your actual model, sandbox or API. Automated + human scoring with full audit trails.
pillars.workspaceBody: Chat, negotiate, contract, pay and review — all inside one secure, audit-ready platform.

PROFILE_OPT.heading: Optimise a trainer profile

hero.title: From a brief to a paid contract — in one platform
hero.body: Trainova AI is the marketplace, evaluation system and collaboration workspace built for AI training work. Here is what the journey looks like.

marketplace.title: Find verified specialists
marketplace.body: Search trainers by skill, language, country, model experience and rating. Filter to the people who have actually shipped what you need.

evaluation.title: Test on your live model
evaluation.body: Connect your API, sandbox or evaluation environment. Candidates are scored automatically and reviewed by your team — no take-home guesswork.

workspace.title: Negotiate, contract, pay
workspace.body: Chat, share files, track tasks, sign the contract, release escrow and review — all in one audit-ready workspace.

steps.title: The full workflow, step by step

1.title: Post a request
1.body: Use the AI-assisted request builder to define skills, conditions, evaluation environment and budget. We auto-suggest pricing from comparable contracts.

2.title: Receive applications
2.body: Verified trainers apply. The matching engine ranks them by skills, languages, prior models and rating fit.

3.title: Run the evaluation
3.body: Send a screening test, a hands-on task on your model, or a multi-stage workflow. Auto + manual scoring with full audit trail.

4.title: Pick a finalist
4.body: Compare attempts side-by-side, chat with finalists, then move them to acceptance with one click.

5.title: Sign + pay via escrow
5.body: Generate the contract (NDA / MSA / SOW), sign digitally, fund the escrow. The trainer can begin work the same day.

6.title: Review + repeat
6.body: Release escrow on milestone approval, exchange verified reviews and re-engage your top trainers for future projects.

cta.bottomTitle: Ready to ship better AI training projects?
cta.bottomBody: Start as a company or as a trainer — both sides are free to join.

hero.title: Hire, test and contract elite AI trainers
hero.body: Stop guessing from CVs. Vet candidates on your actual model — fine-tuning, RLHF, evaluation, safety, prompt engineering and more.

requestBuilder.title: AI-assisted request builder
requestBuilder.body: Generate a structured request from a brief. Skill list, screening questions and evaluation criteria included.

evaluation.title: Live model evaluation
evaluation.body: Plug in your API, sandbox or dataset and score candidates on the actual problem they will solve.

matching.title: Smart shortlist
matching.body: AI matching ranks the top trainers by skill fit, response time, ratings and prior model experience.

chat.title: Negotiation workspace
chat.body: Encrypted chat, file sharing, attachment scanning and AI-generated summaries — built for hiring decisions.

contracts.title: Escrow + e-signature
contracts.body: NDA / MSA / SOW templates, digital signature, milestone-funded escrow and automatic VAT-compliant invoices.

analytics.title: Spend + ROI analytics
analytics.body: Track applications, time-to-hire, cost-per-hire and trainer performance across all your projects.

cta.bottomTitle: Ready to find the right AI trainer?
cta.bottomBody: Free to post a request — no credit card required.

hero.title: Build your AI training career
hero.body: Get matched with global contracts, prove your skills on real company models, and get paid securely via escrow.

discoverability.title: Be found by real buyers
discoverability.body: Verified profiles, skill pages and AI matching make sure companies hiring for your specialty actually see you.

fairTests.title: Fair, on-model tests
fairTests.body: Companies test you on the real problem. No vague take-homes — your results speak for themselves.

escrow.title: Get paid via escrow
escrow.body: Funded escrow per milestone. We hold the money so the company can’t ghost you after delivery.

workbench.title: Built-in workbench
workbench.body: Run prompts, evaluate outputs, attach proof of work — all from one tested AI workbench.

badges.title: Verified badges
badges.body: Pass our skill-specific certifications and stand out with badges that companies trust.

global.title: Global reach
global.body: Work from anywhere. We localise pricing, taxes and contracts for over 100 countries.

1.title: Build your profile
1.body: Add skills, languages, certifications, sample work and a portfolio.

2.title: Pass certifications
2.body: Earn badges in your specialties to unlock priority placement.

3.title: Apply + pass tests
3.body: Apply to open requests and prove yourself on the company’s live model.

4.title: Get paid + reviewed
4.body: Deliver milestones, release escrow, collect verified reviews and re-engage.

earnings.title: Real earnings, real protections
earnings.body: Trainova AI’s escrow holds the company’s funds before you start work, so you never deliver without security.

verification.body: Get verified once and unlock featured placement, sponsored category pages and direct invitations from companies.

cta.bottomTitle: Ready to grow your AI training career?
cta.bottomBody: Free to join. We only earn when you do.

hero.title: Insights from the AI training frontier
hero.body: Field reports, technique deep-dives and ecosystem updates from the Trainova AI team and our specialists.

blog.empty: No articles published yet. Check back soon.

hero.title: Frequently asked questions
hero.body: Quick answers to the most common questions about Trainova AI for companies and trainers.

faq.empty: FAQ coming soon. In the meantime, ping us via the contact form.

hero.title: Talk to the Trainova AI team
hero.body: Whether it’s sales, support or partnerships — we read every message and respond within one business day.

form.name: Your name
form.messageHelp: Tell us in 1–2 paragraphs so we can route this to the right team.

success.title: Message received.
success.body: Thanks — a teammate will reply within one business day. If your enquiry is urgent, please email support@trainova.ai directly.

faqLink.title: Looking for a quick answer?
faqLink.body: Most questions are already answered in our FAQ.

hero.title: Reach the AI training ecosystem
hero.body: Featured placements, sponsored search results, category sponsorships and newsletter slots — built for AI tools, cloud providers, dataset platforms and labeling vendors.

FEATURED_COMPANY.title: Featured Company
FEATURED_COMPANY.body: Pin your company to homepage and search results so AI trainers see you first.

SPONSORED_TRAINER.title: Sponsored Trainer
SPONSORED_TRAINER.body: Boost individual trainer visibility in their categories and skill pages.

CATEGORY_SPONSOR.title: Category Sponsorship
CATEGORY_SPONSOR.body: Own an entire AI specialty page (e.g. RLHF, Prompt Engineering) for the quarter.

NEWSLETTER.title: Newsletter Slot
NEWSLETTER.body: Place a sponsored block in our weekly newsletter to companies and trainers.

enquiry.title: Tell us what you’re thinking
enquiry.body: Share your audience, target, budget and timing. We’ll come back with a tailored proposal.

success.title: Request received.
success.body: Thanks — our partnerships team will reply within one business day with package options.

boost.subtitle: Float to the top of search and matching results.
